name: Broccoli and Tofu in Spicy Almond Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, whisk together almond butter and hot water until you have a uniform mixture.
2. Whisk in the remaining sauce ingredients (cider vinegar, tamari sauce, blackstrap molasses, and cayenne pepper) and set aside.
3. Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok. Stir-fry half the ginger and garlic for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add tofu chunks to the skillet and stir-fry for 5-7 minutes until the tofu is golden brown.
5. Mix the cooked tofu with the sauce, then add onion slices and sauté for about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in the remaining garlic, fresh pepper (if using), and cashews. Add the broccoli florets and tamari sauce; stir-fry until the broccoli is bright green.
7. Toss the broccoli mixture with the sauce, mixing in the minced scallions as you toss.
8. Serve hot over rice.
Shared by Richard Darsie
Source: The Enchanted Broccoli Forest
